heading: “State” defined
label: 1962c–5 “State” defined
text: For the purpose of this subchapter the term “State” means a State, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands or Guam.
notes: Amendments1976— inserted reference to Guam.Pub. L. 94–285
amendments: Amendments1976— inserted reference to Guam.Pub. L. 94–285
